code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = tokens.get(i)
  match tok
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      if n % 2 == 0
        sum = sum + n
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("sum_even=#{sum}")
